CustomField.formula: CASE( RecordType.DeveloperName , "Time", InvoicePOSTotalTimeCHF__c - FullCostsTotalTimeCHF__c , "Expense", InvoicePOSTotalExpenseCHF__c - CostsTotalExpenseCHF__c , "SupplierCosts", InvoicePOSTotalSupplierCostsCHF__c - CostsTotalSupplierCostsCHF__c ,0)
CustomField.label: Margin - Amount (CHF)
